The '''Alou Belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] that occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Baralou (star)|Baralou]] within the [[Baralou system/Legends|Baralou system]]<ref name="PoG1" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Alou Belt was first mentioned in ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'', a [[1991]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="PoG1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Baralou [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the Alou Belt, in grid square H-20.<ref name="TEA" />
